verification_notes: Static review: render/onCellClick/onRestart/mount signatures match contract. Renderer holds no game logic, does not import rules-engine or ai-opponent. CSS provides 3x3 grid, hover only on empty cells, .ttt-cell--win highlight, system font stack, restart button. ViewModel shape consumed exactly.

sub_goals.description: Implement ui-render.js (renderer, mount, onCellClick, onRestart, render(viewModel)) exactly per contract. Pure projection of viewModel onto DOM; no game logic.

Implement ui-render.css with 3x3 CSS grid, hover state on empty cells, X/O glyphs styling, turn-indicator + status + restart-button styling, .winning-line highlight, .disabled board state. Minimal-but-tidy per I2.
